proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0) { T0.0 = x0 = zero_ideal[T0](x0) }[F](F.1)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { x0(T0.1) != ideal_proper_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](zero_ideal[F])
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { x0(T0.1) != ideal_proper_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](other)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[F](x, x.inverse)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](x)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0) { T0.0 = x0 = zero_ideal[T0](x0) }[F](x)

goal: ideal_subset[F](other, zero_ideal[F]) = forall(x0: F) { other(x0) implies zero_ideal(x0) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x1(x2) } = ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[F](other, zero_ideal[F])
let w0: F satisfy { other(w0) and not zero_ideal(w0) }
function(x0: F) { not other(x0) or zero_ideal(x0) }(w0)

not forall(x0: F -> Bool) { not is_ideal[F](x0) or not ideal_subset[F](zero_ideal[F], x0) or not ideal_proper_constraint[F](x0) or ideal_subset[F](x0, zero_ideal[F]) } or not ideal_proper_constraint[F](zero_ideal[F]) or not is_ideal[F](zero_ideal[F])
let w0: F -> Bool satisfy { is_ideal[F](w0) and ideal_subset[F](zero_ideal[F], w0) and ideal_proper_constraint[F](w0) and not ideal_subset[F](w0, zero_ideal[F]) }
function(x0: F -> Bool) { not ideal_subset[F](zero_ideal[F], x0) or not ideal_proper_constraint[F](x0) or not is_ideal[F](x0) or ideal_subset[F](x0, zero_ideal[F]) }(w0)
is_ideal[F](w0) and ideal_subset[F](zero_ideal[F], w0) and ideal_proper_constraint[F](w0)
